subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast an illumined heart! Thou art even as the pupil of the eye, the very wellspring of the light, for God's love hath cast its rays
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای صاحب قلب روشن تو مانند مردمک چشم می مانی که معدن نور است زیرا در دلت نور
subcodes.subjects: @race unity; racial issues, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
